Claims for imaging procedures are a subset of the claims, and a subset of procedures in the Part B carrier 
and DME data files. These imaging claim lines are defined as those with a line BETOS code (BETOS_CD) 
where the first digit = I (except for “I1E,” or “I1F” — which are considered Part B drugs).
